message:
Water Service Advisory
Ang SRWD ay magsasagawa ng System Flushing bukas, April 16, 2026 (2PM - onwards). Makararanas ng paghina at pagdumi ng supply ng tubig sa Brgy. Del Pilar, Gomez, Luna, San Mariano, Mabini at Tramo-Del Pilar habang at pagkatapos isagawa ang naturang aktibidad.
Paunawa sa abala.
Don't forget to log in and accomplish your water-saving goals for this week to stay on track with your progress.
Congratulations on finishing one of your tasks; you are officially making a measurable difference in your water consumption.
Your weekly usage data is now ready for review, so please check your dashboard to see how your habits affected your bill.
You are doing great work on your weekly challenge—keep checking off your tasks to reach your 5-week milestone.
